title: Death Sorter
description: A vanilla-friendly mod that automatically restores your inventory layout when picking up items after death.
body:
### Welcome, this is a beta version of the Death Sorter mod!
If you find any bugs, make sure to let me know!

Death Sorter is a vanilla-friendly mod that automatically restores your inventory layout when picking up your items after death.

When a player dies, their items are dropped as usual, with the risk of being destroyed or despawning. Upon retrieving their items, they are placed in the same slot they were in before death — including armor and offhand slots, as long as those slots are not already occupied.

### Support me.
If you like my work, support me on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/user?u=8618666). Your support would be greatly appreciated!

### Required mods:
[Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)

### Join my Discord server: 

[https://discord.gg/cRXQvbZD4S](https://discord.gg/cRXQvbZD4S)
